title: feat: add kcolbchain ecosystem entry
description:
## Summary

Adds kcolbchain to the x402 ecosystem page.

- **kcolbchain** is an open-source blockchain research collective (est. 2015) building agent payment tooling
- **Switchboard**, our key project, implements x402 payment flows alongside MPP, AP2, and escrow protocols — giving AI agents a unified interface to negotiate and settle payments across multiple schemes
- Category: Infrastructure & Tooling
- Website: https://kcolbchain.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/kcolbchain

## Changes

- `type
_raw_body:
## Summary

Adds kcolbchain to the x402 ecosystem page.

- **kcolbchain** is an open-source blockchain research collective (est. 2015) building agent payment tooling
- **Switchboard**, our key project, implements x402 payment flows alongside MPP, AP2, and escrow protocols — giving AI agents a unified interface to negotiate and settle payments across multiple schemes
- Category: Infrastructure & Tooling
- Website: https://kcolbchain.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/kcolbchain

## Changes

- `typescript/site/app/ecosystem/partners-data/kcolbchain/metadata.json` — partner metadata
- `typescript/site/public/logos/kcolbchain.svg` — logo asset

title: Add TrustGate to ecosystem
description:
## Summary

Adds TrustGate to the x402 ecosystem directory.

- **What it does**: Layered trust scoring for x402 agent wallets — combines ERC-8004 reputation, on-chain wallet history, and x402 dispute rates into a composite 0–10 score
- **Pricing**: $0.01 USDC per check on Base mainnet via x402
- **Category**: Services/Endpoints
- **Live**: https://trust-gate-production.up.railway.app
- **Source**: https://github.com/oceanrun/trust-gate

## Files added

- `typescript/site/app/ecosystem/partners-d
_raw_body:
## Summary

Adds TrustGate to the x402 ecosystem directory.

- **What it does**: Layered trust scoring for x402 agent wallets — combines ERC-8004 reputation, on-chain wallet history, and x402 dispute rates into a composite 0–10 score
- **Pricing**: $0.01 USDC per check on Base mainnet via x402

title: ecosystem: add Alderpost Intelligence — 8 bundled intelligence endpoints on Base
description:
## Description

Add Alderpost Intelligence to the x402 ecosystem. 

8 x402-gated intelligence API endpoints on Base mainnet, each bundling 7-9 premium data sources (VirusTotal, People Data Labs, Hunter.io, AbuseIPDB, Qualys SSL Labs, NIH RxNorm, US Census Bureau, OpenWeather) into single scored responses. $0.10-0.15 USDC per call.

Endpoints: domain-shield, company-xray, threat-pulse, prospect-iq, compliance-check, health-signal, property-intel, sports-edge.

Live at https://www.alderpos
_raw_body:
## Description

Add Alderpost Intelligence to the x402 ecosystem. 

8 x402-gated intelligence API endpoints on Base mainnet, each bundling 7-9 premium data sources (VirusTotal, People Data Labs, Hunter.io, AbuseIPDB, Qualys SSL Labs, NIH RxNorm, US Census Bureau, OpenWeather) into single scored responses. $0.10-0.15 USDC per call.

Endpoints: domain-shield, company-xray, threat-pulse, prospect-iq, compliance-check, health-signal, property-intel, sports-edge.

Live at https://www.alderpost.co

Note: Logo file (alderpost.png) will be added in a follow-up commit.

title: Add Bermuda to ecosystem directory
description:
## Summary
- Adds Bermuda to the x402 ecosystem partners directory
- Bermuda provides ZK-private HTTP payments for x402 using Noir zero-knowledge proofs on Base, enabling sender privacy for AI agents and API consumers

## Changes
- `typescript/site/app/ecosystem/partners-data/bermuda/metadata.json` — partner metadata
- `typescript/site/public/logos/bermuda.png` — logo asset

**Website:** https://www.bermudabay.xyz
**GitHub:** https://github.com/BermudaBay
_raw_body:
